description_long: This lounge ensemble features a large, L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in deep green material, accompanied by a matching armchair and ottoman. The arrangement includes a rectangular wooden coffee table, a round side table, and a vintage television set on slender legs. A tall, dark wood planter box with lush green plants acts as a partial divider, while a set of teal curtains on a brass rod and a modern pendant lamp add a touch of mid-century style. The space is further defined by a standing door panel, a wall-mounted shelf with books and decor, and a small, retro fan. The overall design is cohesive, with a blend of wood, metal, and fabric elements, evoking a stylish, urban living room suitable for communal relaxation.
description: A mid-century modern lounge set with a green sectional sofa, matching armchair, wooden tables, vintage TV, and decorative planter divider, accented by teal curtains and retro accessories.
description_view_0: The sectional sofa, armchair, and ottoman are prominent, with the planter divider and curtain rod clearly visible, along with the pendant lamp and side tables.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front of the lounge, showcasing the TV, coffee table, and the arrangement of the sofa and armchair, with the door panel and planter in the background.
description_view_2: The sectional sofa's back and the full length of the planter divider are visible, along with the TV and tables, emphasizing the spatial layout.
description_view_3: The rear of the sectional sofa and the curtain rod are most visible, with the back of the planter and the door panel defining the lounge's boundary.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple seat and back cushions on the sectional, with a single cushion on the armchair and ottoman; all cushions appear attached and uniformly sized, forming a continuous seating surface with segmented backrests.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is segmented and moderately high, following the L-shape of the sectional with a slight curve at the corner; it is smooth and unadorned, providing consistent support.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; armrests are straight, padded, and of medium height, matching the sofa's upholstery and style.
attribute_leg_style: Legs are slender, straight, and metallic, with a mid-century modern aesthetic; they are short and slightly tapered, supporting the sofa, tables, and TV stand.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark green with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or tufting; stitching is minimal and unobtrusive.
